user.title: TRMNL HA Climate Connector
user.description: Paste the webhook URL from your TRMNL plugin's Settings page (Plugins → your plugin → Webhook URL).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the webhook URL. Check that it is correct and that TRMNL is reachable.

abort.already_configured: This webhook URL is already configured.

init.title: Chart Settings
init.description: Configure a history chart shown alongside the current sensor values. Requires the HA Recorder integration and sensors with long-term statistics enabled.
